## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] Ran script locally
- [ ] Parser check passed
- [ ] Behavior verified for the changed flow

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README/USER_MANUAL if needed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG for user-visible changes

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific you want reviewed.
